title: Patina Over Stone
description: An extension of Patina that replaces stone tools with copper tools
body:
This datapack is an extension of Patina, replacing stone tools with copper tools in the progression.

## Details
 This datapack will not work without the Patina datapack and resourcepack. It also changes the following:
- Stone tool recipes have their stone materials replaced with bedrock
- Stone tool recipes cannot be unlocked
- The wooden pickaxe can now mine all copper type blocks
- "Getting an Upgrade" advancement's icon has been replaced with a copper pickaxe and the unlock criteria is changed to obtaining a copper pickaxe.
